subcodes.first_line: The Sun of Guidance, Light of the highest heavens, Lamp of the Supreme Concourse, hath ascended from the niche of this mortal realm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان شمس الهدی نور السموات العلی مصباح الملا الاعلی قد صعد من مشکوه الناسوت
subcodes.subjects: @Ascension of Baha'u'llah, @consolation and comfort, @Manifestation of God as sun, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment
